alertingAuditDetails.alertDescription: Subject maintains undeclared offshore trust structures in BVI and Labuan with estimated assets of SGD 8.5M. IRAS referral flagged unreported foreign-sourced income exceeding SGD 2M annually for FY2023–2025. Trust distributions routed through nominee accounts in Singapore before conversion to physical gold and safe deposit box storage. No income tax filings for offshore structures. Former banking professional with 18 years experience.
